directions_tried.name: Phase 1 — Rapid Probes
directions_tried.outcome: All three probes produced quantitative results.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2 — Root Cause Diagnosis
directions_tried.outcome: ω³ unification confirmed novel. Fix space bleak. Faria-França (2004) not yet found.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3B — Adversarial Review
directions_tried.outcome: Faria-França (2004) found as prior art for exponential structure. Claims A-D novelty clarified. T_ion τ bug flagged.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: SED double-well barrier crossing vs WKB tunneling rate
explorations_completed.key_finding: Γ formula discovered: Γ_SED/Γ_WKB ≈ exp(S_WKB − V_b/E_zpf). 15% at crossover (λ=0.25), 18× overestimate (λ=0.10).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Two coupled SED oscillators: ZPF correlations and Bell-CHSH
explorations_completed.key_finding: C_xx(d)=cos(ω₀d/c). Bell S ≤ 2 always (tautological — reframed to SED-QM discrepancy in C_xx).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: SED hydrogen: time to self-ionization as function of L
explorations_completed.key_finding: First quantitative T_ion(L) table. No stability window. τ bug: 60× too large.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Phase 2 root cause synthesis: literature survey + claim assessment
explorations_completed.key_finding: ω³ unification novel synthesis. Fix space bleak. ω_local=√2 universality.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Verify Γ formula at 5+ λ values
Adversarial review of all four novel claims
explorations_completed.key_finding: Faria-França (2004) has core exponential structure (prior art). Claims A=marginally novel, B=not novel, C=partially novel (τ bug), D=partially novel synthesis.
